title: ervilia pisiformis
intro: Ervilia pisiformis, also known as the kidney vetch, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. The plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and other kidney-related issues due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ervilia pisiformis include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting urination, which can help alleviate symptoms of kidney problems. Ervilia pisiformis can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion by steeping the dried leaves and flowers in hot water, or used in conjunction with other herbs in a medicinal tincture.
